name: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken RPG
description:
an RPG about Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken, since I watched it for the 100th time, I wanted to bring it here.

I added: leveling management, inventory and acquisition of skills and spells, but the coolest thing is that I put that you reincarnate into a creature based on your last words, you could become a slime, ogre, direwolf, etc.

the skills and spells are given based on the race you are reincarnated into, and your last words give you skills or spells, there is also the Rank, you will start from the bottom, but as you advance you could become S+ calamity, each race evolves, example: slime-re slime-ultimate slime; ogre-kijin-oni; direwolf-tempest wolf-tempest star wolf, etc.

Remember to use Memory Chat for important things!
creator: Gallicus
